##NAMES=Trevorite
##RRUFFID=R150038
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=NiFe^3+^_2_O_4_
##LOCALITY=Agios Konstantinos, Lavrion District slag localities, Attikí Prefecture, Greece
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Black octahedral crystals, associated with R150037 euhedral vitreous green liebenbergite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150038
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ni_0.95_Mg_0.03_Zn_0.02_)(Fe^3+^_1.08_Al_0.74_Mg_0.09_Si_0.04_V^3+^_0.03_Ti_0.02_)O_4_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.194 b: 8.194 c: 8.194 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 550.11 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
